title: overnet-burner metric event v1
description: One measurement record emitted by a burner worker. Streams are JSONL: one event object per line.

phase.description: Workload phase the operation ran in (for example warmup, main, cooldown). Required in multi-phase runs; see METRICS.md.

outcome.description: Abuse operations only: the Overnet core outcome category the relay returned (accepted, rejected, unauthorized, unavailable, unsupported, partial). See abuse.md.

error_category.description: Abuse operations only: the Overnet core error category for a rejection (invalid input, policy rejection, authentication failure, authorization failure, unsupported, not found, internal failure). Absent when the operation was accepted. See abuse.md.

defended.description: Abuse operations only: whether the relay stopped this abuse. See abuse.md.

defended_correct.description: Abuse operations only: whether the relay stopped this abuse with the spec-correct outcome and error category for the role. Implies defended. See abuse.md.
